---
name: Bug report
about: Report an issue with a Knowledge Base document, standard, or repository artifact
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Location

Document, file, or section where the issue occurs.

## Expected behavior

What should happen or what should the document say?

## Actual behavior

What is wrong?

## Impact

How does this affect readers, agents, or implementations?

## Suggested fix

Optional proposed correction.

## References

Links to related KB documents, ADRs, or specifications.
